headline: ContextLogic appoints Cantaloupe alum to dual CFO, COO seat
summary: Scott Stewart is stepping in as CFO and COO in the latest executive leadership shift by the former Wish owner turned business holding company.

headline: 'Compute Is The New Oil' – CME And Intercontinental To Launch Futures Exchanges To Trade AI Computing Power
summary: Investors have a new way to bet on the AI revolution — the computing power that fuels it. Later this year, the derivatives exchange operators Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) and CME Group will launch compute futures contracts, providing traders, financial...

headline: ICE Introduces Fraud Monitor to Help Mortgage Lenders Identify Fraud Risk and Accelerate Underwriting
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, June 01, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced the launch of ICE Fraud Monitor, a robust mortgage fraud and property research solution designed to help lenders reduce risk and expedite underwriting.

headline: NYSE Content Update: FedEx Freight to List on the NYSE + Join S&P 500
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.
